overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a desert road on the outskirts of Night City. The clip features rocky desert cliffs, industrial structures, passing vehicles, and pedestrians, with the futuristic city skyline visible in the distance. The camera follows an NPC in a blue vest before continuing along a graffiti-covered sidewalk.

events.description: red van passes by on the left side of the road
black car passes by on the left side of the road
pedestrian in brown clothing crosses the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the desert road sidewalk toward an intersection

man in brown clothing crossing the street at the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a desert highway with rocky cliffs on the left and industrial structures ahead. Vehicles pass by on the road while approaching a crosswalk where a pedestrian is crossing. The tall industrial tower dominates the center of the view against the clear blue sky.

tall concrete retaining wall with graffiti

segments.scene_description: Turning left at the intersection reveals the stunning Night City skyline with towering futuristic buildings in the distance. The camera follows a pedestrian in a blue vest along the sidewalk, with rocky cliffs now on the right side and an industrial concrete wall on the left.

passing multiple pedestrians walking in opposing directions

The camera passes several pedestrians including a distinctive character with red hair. The environment features sparse desert vegetation and concrete infrastructure.

segments.scene_description: Walking past a prominent industrial wall featuring large '666' graffiti art styled with American flag patterns. The rocky cliffs rise behind the wall, and the sidewalk continues alongside the multi-lane road with occasional vehicles passing by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate desert highway toward the sprawling urban edge of Night City. It begins by advancing along a road flanked by rocky cliffs and industrial structures, passing vehicles as it approaches a pedestrian at a crosswalk beneath a towering industrial spire. As the camera turns left at the intersection, the view opens up to reveal the futuristic city skyline in the distance while following a pedestrian in a blue vest along a concrete sidewalk. The scene then shifts further into the urban fringe, passing various pedestrians including a red-haired character amidst sparse desert vegetation and industrial walls. Finally, the movement continues past a prominent concrete wall featuring large 666 graffiti styled with American flag patterns, with the rocky cliffs still looming behind the infrastructure.
